attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled (option A) that the paediatric weight-based dosing sealed in CIA-032 (croup) is acceptable as clinician-administered answer-key content.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CIA casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age (35) and sex_at_birth (female) inferred with NO explicit source signal — the note gives only body weight (71 kg) and independent adult context. Conservative adult values emitted to satisfy the required demographics fields; maintainer/clinician to confirm on review.
Provisional case_id SEQ (SPEC-OPHTH-01-00207) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-OPHTH-01 bucket via ingest --reseq (SPEC-OPHTH-01-00206 already exists).

Specialty code: id uses OPHTH (fits the ^SPEC-[A-Z]{2,6}-...$ id regex) while specialty_tags carries the authoritative taxonomy code OPHTHAL (7 chars, does not fit the id slot) — consistent with the existing SPEC-OPHTH cases and the id_rule.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person after-hours clinician who performed ocular examination (eyelid eversion revealing papillary reaction, pupillary/EOM assessment, chemosis grading) and administered a stat olopatadine drop. These clinician-only findings/actions are sealed in 10/11 with telehealth_limits; the presentation layer was de-anchored to a pre-diagnosis patient account.

Clinician-measured vitals (BP 126/80, HR 88, RR 16, Temp 36.8 C, SpO2 100%) are sealed as clinician measurements (SYM-010); the patient-reportable equivalents (feels non-feverish, breathing normal) are surfaced as objective_data_offered / pertinent-negative disclosure items.

AMT/PBS candidate codes for olopatadine 0.1% and cetirizine were NOT assigned — omitted rather than fabricated pending a terminology receipt (per protocol section 8: an omitted code is preferable to a plausible wrong one). Doses (olopatadine 1 drop each eye BD; cetirizine 10 mg daily) are taken verbatim from the source note, not synthesised.

Tier calibration: correct_baseline_tier T2 (minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T1) — benign self-limiting allergic conjunctivitis is telehealth/pharmacist-manageable; the dramatic presentation is an intentional over-triage trap, so T3+ is scored as over-triage.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
